title: rumohra quadrangularis
intro: Rumohra quadrangularis, also known as the Golden Fern or the Himalayan Maidenhair Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are obtained from its leaves and rhizomes. The health benefits of Rumohra quadrangularis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
